tests_written: 5 column-level + 1 combination uniqueness + 1 not-null on first_pass_yield + 1 accepted-range [0,1]

root_cause.headline: Vendor B forged-blank tolerance band is 30 microns wider than Vendor A — explains 9 of 11 defect modes on Wichita second shift
root_cause.detail: The supplier swap on 2026-05-19 moved the Wichita BRK-CAL line from Vendor A (tolerance band ±15 µm) to Vendor B (tolerance band ±45 µm). The wider tolerance drives bore-diameter variance on the caliper housing, causing 9 of 11 second-shift defect modes this week. The press parameters were not re-tuned to compensate. Kansas City retained Vendor A blanks and shows no yield change. Roll back the blank-supplier swap on the Wichita line — do not re-tune the press.
root_cause.affected_cohort: Wichita BRK-CAL line, second shift, 2026-05-19 to present

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. Plant Ops review happens without the answer.
narrative: Director files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority B.
Data engineer scopes the work the following week — after the Plant Ops review.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four silver marts by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Plant ops team cannot isolate root cause before the review meeting.
Scrap keeps accumulating on the Wichita line at $1.8M/month run rate.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four silver upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 14-day Wichita slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_yield_by_plant_line_shift_daily.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 8 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
Director presents root-cause finding: vendor B tolerance band. Roll back the blank swap.

hero.label: Root cause identified 9 hours before the Plant Ops Review. Scrap clock stopped.
hero.note: From Director question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The Wichita team now knows the supplier swap is the gap: Vendor B's ±45 µm tolerance band drives bore-diameter variance on the caliper housing. Roll back the blank swap. Do not re-tune the press.
